label: Ashglass Quarters
description: Ashglass Quarters is a compact residential suite set within the Pale Meridian Enclave’s stepped ferrocrete terraces, its walls cast thick for blast resistance and thermal retention. The plan resolves into a narrow antechamber and a single living bay, both lit by recessed lumen strips behind armored glass slats that preserve blackout discipline beneath the bruise-hued aurorae. Built-in bunks and storage lockers are mortared into the structure, and a fold-down ration alcove is set beside a sealed wash niche to conserve water and heat. The only external aperture is a slit-window facing a covered causeway, its shutter mechanism keyed to enclave warning beacons and auspex alerts.
